Soham’s S-Tier Movies

I watch more movies than I care to admit and Kabir is making me watch all of Letterboxd’s top 500 movies this year. This is an unranked list of some of my all‑time favourite films. If you have a strong recommendation (or a strong disagreement), feel free to email me.

Portrait of a Lady on Fire
Céline Sciamma
2019
In the Mood for Love
Wong Kar-wai
2000
Autumn Sonata
Ingmar Bergman
1978
Pather Panchali
Satyajit Ray
1955
Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
Michel Gondry
2004
The Seventh Seal
Ingmar Bergman
1957
Persona
Ingmar Bergman
1966
Stalker
Andrei Tarkovsky
1979
8½
Federico Fellini
1963
Mulholland Drive
David Lynch
2001
The Mirror
Andrei Tarkovsky
1975
Chungking Express
Wong Kar-wai
1994
Soham De sohamde[at]uw.edu
